creator: obrien@FreeBSD.org
text:
Responsible Changed
From-To: obrien->freebsd-bugs

This is not a dhclient issue, but an /etc/rc one. 
I have synced the FreeBSD dhclient 2.0 script with the ISC version 3 one. 
If you still have a problem, needed changes should be addressed to the 
ISC DHCP developers.  I will not maintain a greatly rouge version of the 
dhclient script.  It makes taking bug fixes from ISC just too hard.
